nasb.text: By your wisdom and understanding You have acquired riches for yourself And have acquired gold and silver for your treasuries.

esv.text: by your wisdom and your understanding you have made wealth for yourself, and have gathered gold and silver into your treasuries;

cnv.text: 你靠著自己的智慧和聰明， 為自己得了財富， 把所得的金銀放進自己的府庫裡。

ccb.text: 你凭智慧和头脑发了财， 金银装满了你的库房。
